name: Local AI Chatbot Setup
tagline: Your own private AI assistant. No subscriptions. No data leaving your machine.
description: I'll set up a fully local, private AI chatbot on your hardware using Ollama and open-source models. No cloud dependency, no monthly fees after setup, no data harvesting. Runs on modest hardware. You own it completely.
features: Model selection matched to your hardware specs
Simple web UI for non-technical users
Basic system prompt tuning for your use case
Documentation so you can maintain it yourself
pricing_model: Flat fee $149 setup / $49 for additional model configs
estimated_roi_per_business: Replaces $20-100/month ChatGPT or Copilot subscription within 2 months
